ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., gene expression, protein interaction) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset (e.g., in MB or GB) */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference or ID from the data source */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the dataset, if applicable */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Indicates whether the dataset is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis method used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the experiment belongs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., 'planned', 'in progress', 'completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that produced the result */,
  "mean_proximity" REAL /* Mean proximity value calculated from the data */,
  "z_score" REAL /* Z-score calculated from the analysis */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating statistical significance */,
  "num_targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets involved in the analysis */,
  "mean_degrees" REAL /* Mean degrees associated with the targets */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the statistical results */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the mean */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "recommended_analysis_methods" TEXT /* JSON array of recommended analysis methods for this data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., t-test, ANOVA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the method is applied */,
  "default_parameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing default parameters for the method */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example usage or command for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., 'read', 'write') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the permission allows */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., 'basic', 'advanced') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., 'Researcher', 'Admin') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the responsibilities associated with the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permission IDs associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role relationship */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the researcher */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the role became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'download') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value (e.g., 'C', 'hours') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical test */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the test belongs to */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used in the test */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result generated by the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_tests_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_tests_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_tests_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrity check */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., 'pass', 'fail') */,
  "log_file" TEXT /* Path to the log file containing detailed check results */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of integrity check performed (e.g., 'checksum', 'validation') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_checks_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., 'Database A') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint to access the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sources" (
  "dataset_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-source relationship */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was imported from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
